# jellyfin_networking_configuration (Resource)

Manages the Jellyfin networking configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_networking_configuration" "example" {
  base_url                               = ""
  enable_https                           = false
  require_https                          = false
  certificate_path                       = ""
  certificate_password                   = ""
  internal_http_port                     = 0
  internal_https_port                    = 0
  public_http_port                       = 0
  public_https_port                      = 0
  auto_discovery                         = false
  enable_upnp                            = false
  enable_ipv4                            = false
  enable_ipv6                            = false
  enable_remote_access                   = false
  local_network_subnets                  = []
  local_network_addresses                = []
  known_proxies                          = []
  ignore_virtual_interfaces              = false
  virtual_interface_names                = []
  enable_published_server_uri_by_request = false
  published_server_uri_by_subnet         = []
  remote_ip_filter                       = []
  is_remote_ip_filter_blacklist          = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auto_discovery` (Boolean) Whether auto discovery is enabled.
- `base_url` (String) The base URL.
- `certificate_password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the TLS certificate.
- `certificate_path` (String) Path to the TLS certificate.
- `enable_https` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is enabled.
- `enable_ipv4` (Boolean) Whether IPv4 is enabled.
- `enable_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether IPv6 is enabled.
- `enable_published_server_uri_by_request` (Boolean) Whether published server URI by request is enabled.
- `enable_remote_access` (Boolean) Whether remote access is enabled.
- `enable_upnp` (Boolean) Whether UPnP is enabled.
- `ignore_virtual_interfaces` (Boolean) Whether virtual interfaces are ignored.
- `internal_http_port` (Number) Internal HTTP port.
- `internal_https_port` (Number) Internal HTTPS port.
- `is_remote_ip_filter_blacklist` (Boolean) Whether the remote IP filter is a blacklist.
- `known_proxies` (List of String) Known proxy addresses.
- `local_network_addresses` (List of String) Local network addresses.
- `local_network_subnets` (List of String) Local network subnets.
- `public_http_port` (Number) Public HTTP port.
- `public_https_port` (Number) Public HTTPS port.
- `published_server_uri_by_subnet` (List of String) Published server URIs by subnet.
- `remote_ip_filter` (List of String) Remote IP filter list.
- `require_https` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is required.
- `virtual_interface_names` (List of String) Virtual interface names.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier. Always set to `networking` for this singleton resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import jellyfin_networking_configuration.example singleton
```
